title: Fix Dashboard Linking in Metrics Tab Becomes Empty After First Link
story: As a data analyst linking dashboards to metrics, I want to be able to link multiple dashboards in sequence without refreshing the page, so that I can efficiently associate metrics with their visual representations.
description:
After linking a dashboard to a metric and adding reports, subsequent attempts to link another dashboard result in an empty dashboard list. The page requires a manual refresh to select new metrics and link additional dashboards.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Add a dashboard and select one or more reports
2. Complete adding the dashboard
3. Attempt to select a new metric and add another dashboard
4. Dashboard list appears empty
acceptance_criteria: Multiple dashboards can be linked in sequence without page refresh
Dashboard list repopulates correctly after each linking action
Reports association persists correctly for each linked dashboard
ux_changes: Fixed dashboard list state reset after linking to ensure subsequent dashboard selections show available options.
middleware_changes: Fixed state management for dashboard list to properly refresh after a dashboard-report linking action.
implementation_notes: Root cause was the dashboard list state not being reset after completing a linking action.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue and submitted for review.
